requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Safety — EV Charging Equipment (Estonia / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 低压安全——电动汽车充电设备（爱沙尼亚／欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓安全——電動汽車充電設備（愛沙尼亞／歐盟）

summary.en: EV charging equipment placed on the Estonian / EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU, ensuring it is designed and manufactured to be safe when correctly installed and maintained. Equipment must meet the Essential Safety Requirements (Annex I) covering protection against electric shock, insulation, overcurrent/overtemperature protection, and clearances. Harmonised standard EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Mode 1–4 conductive charging, AC and DC, general requirements) provides a presumption of conformity. EVS (Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation) adopts EN standards as EVS-EN; EU LVD compliance satisfies Estonian market access requirements. TJA (Technical Regulatory Authority) oversees electrical safety enforcement in Estonia. Cold-climate safety requirements specific to Estonia: equipment placed in outdoor or unheated environments must be designed, rated, and tested for safe operation at ambient temperatures down to −30 °C, including electrical insulation performance at low temperature, mechanical integrity of housings and connectors in freeze-thaw cycling, and safe operation of protection devices (RCDs, MCBs) at low temperature.
summary.zh: 在爱沙尼亚/欧盟市场销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合低压指令2014/35/EU，确保其在正确安装及维护条件下安全运行。设备须满足附件I基本安全要求，涵盖防触电、绝缘、过流/过温保护及电气间隙。协调标准EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4传导充电，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。EVS（爱沙尼亚标准化与认可中心）以EVS-EN形式采用EN标准；符合欧盟低电压指令即满足爱沙尼亚市场准入要求。技术监管局（TJA）负责爱沙尼亚电气安全执法。爱沙尼亚特定低温气候安全要求：放置于室外或非保温环境的设备须针对环境温度低至-30°C的安全运行进行设计、额定和测试，包括低温电气绝缘性能、外壳和接口在冻融循环下的机械完整性，以及保护装置（RCD、MCB）在低温下的安全运行。
summary.zht: 在愛沙尼亞/歐盟市場銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU，確保其在正確安裝及維護條件下安全運行。設備須滿足附件I基本安全要求，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、過流/過溫保護及電氣間隙。協調標準EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4傳導充電，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。EVS（愛沙尼亞標準化與認可中心）以EVS-EN形式採用EN標準；符合歐盟低電壓指令即滿足愛沙尼亞市場准入要求。技術監管局（TJA）負責愛沙尼亞電氣安全執法。愛沙尼亞特定低溫氣候安全要求：放置於室外或非保溫環境的設備須針對環境溫度低至-30°C的安全運行進行設計、額定和測試，包括低溫電氣絕緣性能、外殼和接口在凍融循環下的機械完整性，以及保護裝置（RCD、MCB）在低溫下的安全運行。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU (Low Voltage Directive) — mandatory CE marking for EV chargers on the Estonian market
EN IEC 61851-1:2019 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (harmonised standard, adopted as EVS-EN IEC 61851-1 in Estonia)

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporates national deviations. It is enforced under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB/T 18487.1 testing and certification by a Chinese CNAS-accredited lab is NOT recognised as equivalent to EN IEC 61851-1 testing under the EU LVD conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国常见参考标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关但含有国家偏差，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会监督执行。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 18487.1出具的检测及认证，不被欧盟LVD合格评定程序直接认可为等同。
summary.zht: 中國常見參考標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關但含有國家偏差，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會監督執行。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1出具的檢測及認證，不被歐盟LVD合格評定程序直接認可為等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build an EU conformity file against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-1:2019 testing as evidence for presumption of conformity. Existing Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports do not automatically substitute because scope, deviations, connector assumptions, and documentation differ. For Estonia specifically: (1) supply voltage validation at 230/400 V (not only China 220/380 V); (2) cold-climate safety testing at −30 °C ambient for outdoor installations — Chinese standard test conditions typically do not extend to this temperature; (3) IP rating for snow and ice ingress into connector inlets and cable entry points; (4) documentation in Estonian or English for TJA and installer review.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕低压指令基本安全要求建立欧盟合规技术文件，并可采用EN IEC 61851-1:2019检测作为推定符合性的证据。现有GB/T 18487.1检测报告不会自动替代，因为范围、偏差、接口假设及文件要求不同。爱沙尼亚特定要求：(1) 在230/400 V（而非仅中国220/380 V）的供电电压验证；(2) 室外安装须在-30°C环境温度下进行低温气候安全测试——中国标准测试条件通常不延伸至此温度；(3) 接口插座和电缆入口对雪和冰进入的IP防护等级；(4) TJA和安装商审查所需的爱沙尼亚语或英语文件。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞低電壓指令基本安全要求建立歐盟合規技術文件，並可採用EN IEC 61851-1:2019檢測作為推定符合性的證據。現有GB/T 18487.1檢測報告不會自動替代，因為範圍、偏差、接口假設及文件要求不同。愛沙尼亞特定要求：(1) 在230/400 V（而非僅中國220/380 V）的供電電壓驗證；(2) 室外安裝須在-30°C環境溫度下進行低溫氣候安全測試——中國標準測試條件通常不延伸至此溫度；(3) 接口插座和電纜入口對雪和冰進入的IP防護等級；(4) TJA和安裝商審查所需的愛沙尼亞語或英語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/35/EU and CE marking before EU/Estonian market placement, enforced by TJA. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is voluntary harmonised-standard evidence for presumption of conformity; alternative technical solutions are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the LVD essential safety requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

source.publisher: Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation (EVS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory for EV chargers in Estonia, enforced by TJA. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can grant presumption of conformity; it is not the legal obligation itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 certification does not by itself satisfy the EU conformity assessment pathway. Additionally: validate at 230/400 V (not only 220/380 V), and ensure cold-climate operation documentation (−30 °C) for outdoor Estonian installations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 爱沙尼亚电动汽车充电器须依据LVD 2014/35/EU强制取得CE标志，由TJA执行。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用于推定符合性的自愿协调标准，并非法律义务本身。中国GB/T 18487.1认证本身不满足欧盟合格评定路径。此外：须在230/400 V（而非仅220/380 V）下验证，并确保室外爱沙尼亚安装的低温运行文件（-30°C）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 愛沙尼亞電動汽車充電器須依據LVD 2014/35/EU強制取得CE標誌，由TJA執行。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用於推定符合性的自願協調標準，並非法律義務本身。中國GB/T 18487.1認證本身不滿足歐盟合格評定路徑。此外：須在230/400 V（而非僅220/380 V）下驗證，並確保室外愛沙尼亞安裝的低溫運行文件（-30°C）。

requirement_topic.en: DC Charging Station Safety — EV Conductive Charging (Estonia)
requirement_topic.zh: 直流充电站安全——电动汽车传导充电（爱沙尼亚）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流充電站安全——電動汽車傳導充電（愛沙尼亞）

summary.en: DC charging stations (Mode 4, off-board chargers) placed on the Estonian / EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU where within scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station) is a current product standard that may be used as technical evidence and, where cited as harmonised, gives presumption of conformity; it is not itself the mandatory legal obligation. Key technical topics include isolation monitoring, interlock systems, control pilot functions, maximum voltage/current ratings, and communication protocols for DC supply. For Estonia: DC fast chargers at outdoor public locations must be rated for continuous operation at −30 °C ambient — cable management, connector heating, and housing insulation documentation are required. CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) is the mandatory EU connector standard for public DC fast charging under AFIR.
summary.zh: 投放爱沙尼亚/欧盟市场的直流充电站（模式4，非车载充电机）在适用范围内须符合低压指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第23部分：直流电动汽车充电站）是现行产品标准，可作为技术证据使用；在被列为协调标准时，可产生推定符合性，但其本身并非强制性法律义务。核心技术主题包括绝缘监控、互锁系统、控制引导功能、最大电压/电流额定值及直流供电通信协议。对于爱沙尼亚：室外公共位置的直流快充设备须经认证可在-30°C环境温度下持续运行——须提供电缆管理、接口加热和外壳保温文件。CCS2（组合充电系统2型）是AFIR规定的公共直流快充强制欧盟接口标准。
summary.zht: 投放愛沙尼亞/歐盟市場的直流充電站（模式4，非車載充電機）在適用範圍內須符合低電壓指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第23部分：直流電動汽車充電站）是現行產品標準，可作為技術證據使用；在被列為協調標準時，可產生推定符合性，但其本身並非強制性法律義務。核心技術主題包括絕緣監控、互鎖系統、控制導引功能、最大電壓/電流額定值及直流供電通訊協議。對於愛沙尼亞：室外公共位置的直流快充設備須經認證可在-30°C環境溫度下持續運行——須提供電纜管理、接口加熱和外殼保溫文件。CCS2（組合充電系統2型）是AFIR規定的公共直流快充強制歐盟接口標準。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (current edition, adopted as EVS-EN IEC 61851-23 in Estonia)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR) — CCS Combo 2 mandatory for public DC recharging points

summary.en: China's DC charging station domestic equivalent is GB/T 18487.5-2024 (DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 connector). The DC coupler standard is GB/T 20234.3-2023 (supports up to 1500 V / 800 A). CQC or CNAS certification to these Chinese standards is not accepted under the EU LVD CE marking pathway. CCC is mandatory from 1 March 2025 for EV chargers in China under CNCA-C25-01:2024.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电站现行对应标准为GB/T 18487.5-2024（适用于GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充电系统）。直流耦合器标准为GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依据上述中国标准获得的CQC或CNAS认证，在欧盟LVD CE标志合格评定路径下不被接受。依据CNCA-C25-01:2024，中国电动汽车充电器自2025年3月1日起须强制取得CCC认证。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電站現行對應標準為GB/T 18487.5-2024（適用於GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充電系統）。直流耦合器標準為GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依據上述中國標準獲得的CQC或CNAS認證，在歐盟LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑下不被接受。依據CNCA-C25-01:2024，中國電動汽車充電器自2025年3月1日起須強制取得CCC認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 (current DC system standard)
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (supersedes 2015 edition)
CNCA-C25-01:2024 (CCC implementation rules for EV charging equipment — effective 1 March 2025)

gap.en: DC charging stations exported to Estonia should be assessed against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-23:2023 testing as presumption-of-conformity evidence where applicable. Key gaps: (1) CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) connector compliance is mandatory under AFIR for public DC stations — Chinese GB/T 20234.3 plugs are not CCS2 compatible without hardware redesign; (2) isolation monitoring requirements per European grid topology (230/400 V) vs Chinese grid topology (220/380 V); (3) cold-climate operation: outdoor DC fast chargers in Estonia must operate continuously at −30 °C — cable gland seals, connector locking mechanisms, and protection device performance at sub-zero temperatures must be documented; (4) Estonian TJA installation inspection and Elektrilevi (DSO) grid connection agreement required.
gap.zh: 出口爱沙尼亚的直流充电站应针对LVD基本安全要求进行评估，并可在适用时采用EN IEC 61851-23:2023检测作为推定符合性证据。主要差距：(1) CCS2（组合充电系统2型）连接器合规性在AFIR下对公共直流充电站为强制要求——中国GB/T 20234.3插头在未经硬件重新设计的情况下与CCS2不兼容；(2) 欧洲电网拓扑（230/400 V）与中国电网拓扑（220/380 V）下的绝缘监控要求不同；(3) 低温气候运行：爱沙尼亚室外直流快充设备须在-30°C下持续运行——须记录零度以下温度的电缆引入密封、接口锁定机构和保护装置性能；(4) 须完成爱沙尼亚TJA安装检查和Elektrilevi（DSO）并网协议。
gap.zht: 出口愛沙尼亞的直流充電站應針對LVD基本安全要求進行評估，並可在適用時採用EN IEC 61851-23:2023檢測作為推定符合性證據。主要差距：(1) CCS2（組合充電系統2型）連接器合規性在AFIR下對公共直流充電站為強制要求——中國GB/T 20234.3插頭在未經硬件重新設計的情況下與CCS2不相容；(2) 歐洲電網拓撲（230/400 V）與中國電網拓撲（220/380 V）下的絕緣監控要求不同；(3) 低溫氣候運行：愛沙尼亞室外直流快充設備須在-30°C下持續運行——須記錄零度以下溫度的電纜引入密封、接口鎖定機構和保護裝置性能；(4) 須完成愛沙尼亞TJA安裝檢查和Elektrilevi（DSO）並網協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: CE marking under Directive 2014/35/EU where the charger is within LVD scope; AFIR mandates CCS2 for public DC fast charging in Estonia; TJA inspects electrical installations; Elektrilevi DSO connection agreement required.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 18487.5-2024 is the current DC charging system standard; CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

source.publisher: Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation (EVS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC charging stations require CE marking under the applicable EU legislation including LVD where in scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary product standard used as technical evidence; it is not mandatory in itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.5 certification is not accepted as an EU conformity assessment substitute. A significant hardware gap exists where Chinese DC stations use GB/T connectors incompatible with EU CCS2. Estonia-specific: validate at 230/400 V and document cold-climate operation to −30 °C for outdoor public installations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直流充电站须依据适用欧盟法律取得CE标志，其中在低电压指令范围内的产品须符合。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作为技术证据的自愿产品标准，并非自身强制。中国GB/T 18487.5认证不能替代欧盟合格评定。若中国直流充电站使用与欧盟CCS2不兼容的GB/T连接器，则存在重大硬件差距。爱沙尼亚特定要求：在230/400 V下验证，并为室外公共安装记录低至-30°C的低温气候运行文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直流充電站須依據適用歐盟法律取得CE標誌，其中在低電壓指令範圍內的產品須符合。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作為技術證據的自願產品標準，並非自身強制。中國GB/T 18487.5認證不能替代歐盟合格評定。若中國直流充電站使用與歐盟CCS2不相容的GB/T連接器，則存在重大硬件差距。愛沙尼亞特定要求：在230/400 V下驗證，並為室外公共安裝記錄低至-30°C的低溫氣候運行文件。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — EV Charging in Buildings (IEC 60364-7-722) — Estonia
requirement_topic.zh: 建筑内电动汽车充电电气安装安全（IEC 60364-7-722）——爱沙尼亚
requirement_topic.zht: 建築內電動汽車充電電氣安裝安全（IEC 60364-7-722）——愛沙尼亞

summary.en: EU member-state electrical installation law and grid/installer rules govern the building-side circuits supplying EV charging points. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 provide the commonly adopted technical installation route covering protective measures (RCD type B or A+DC detection), wiring, earthing, and load management. These standards apply to the building-side installation infrastructure. Exported EV chargers should be compatible with these installation requirements so they can be accepted by Estonian installers and DSOs (Elektrilevi). Cold-climate specifics for Estonia: wiring systems and cable sheaths must be rated for −30 °C; RCDs and MCBs used in unheated outdoor enclosures must retain full protective function at low temperatures; earthing system connections must resist corrosion and loosening from freeze-thaw cycling.
summary.zh: 欧盟成员国电气安装法律及电网/安装方规则规范电动汽车充电点的建筑侧供电回路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技术安装路径，涵盖保护措施（B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、布线、接地及负荷管理。这些标准适用于建筑侧安装基础设施。出口的充电设备应与相关安装要求兼容，以便获得爱沙尼亚安装商及DSO（Elektrilevi）接受。爱沙尼亚低温气候特殊要求：布线系统和电缆护套须额定至-30°C；非保温室外外壳中使用的RCD和MCB须在低温下保持完整保护功能；接地系统连接须具有抗腐蚀性和抗冻融循环松动性能。
summary.zht: 歐盟成員國電氣安裝法律及電網/安裝方規則規範電動汽車充電點的建築側供電迴路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技術安裝路徑，涵蓋保護措施（B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、布線、接地及負荷管理。這些標準適用於建築側安裝基礎設施。出口的充電設備應與相關安裝要求相容，以便獲得愛沙尼亞安裝商及DSO（Elektrilevi）接受。愛沙尼亞低溫氣候特殊要求：布線系統和電纜護套須額定至-30°C；非保溫室外外殼中使用的RCD和MCB須在低溫下保持完整保護功能；接地系統連接須具有抗腐蝕性和抗凍融循環鬆動性能。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364-7-722:2018 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supply of electric vehicles
HD 60364-7-722:2018 (CENELEC harmonised document, adopted by EU member states)

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation primarily through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). These cover site design and installation but differ from IEC 60364-7-722 in RCD type requirements, earthing system assumptions (TN-S vs. Chinese practice), and load management protocols. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Estonian / EU member-state installation standards.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜，由住房和城乡建设部负责管理。上述标准涵盖场地设计及安装，但在RCD类型要求、接地系统假设（TN-S与中国实践的差异）及负荷管理协议方面与IEC 60364-7-722存在差异。中国安装文件不被接受作为符合爱沙尼亚/欧盟成员国安装标准的证据。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜，由住房和城鄉建設部負責管理。上述標準涵蓋場地設計及安裝，但在RCD類型要求、接地系統假設（TN-S與中國實踐的差異）及負荷管理協議方面與IEC 60364-7-722存在差異。中國安裝文件不被接受作為符合愛沙尼亞/歐盟成員國安裝標準的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (MOHURD)

gap.en: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 are installation standards — they govern fixed wiring and protection devices at the building side. Exported EV chargers should declare compatibility with Type B RCDs or incorporate internal DC fault protection to allow Type A RCDs under EU installation practice. A charger that requires installation conditions not achievable under Estonian / EU electrical codes will fail field acceptance by TJA and Elektrilevi. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes. Estonia-specific cold-climate gap: Chinese installation design standards do not address −30 °C outdoor wiring, freeze-proof enclosures, or cold-weather RCD performance — Estonian project files must address these.
gap.zh: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722为安装标准，规范建筑侧固定布线及保护装置。出口充电设备应依据欧盟安装实践声明与B型RCD兼容，或内置直流故障保护以允许使用A型RCD。若充电设备要求的安装条件在爱沙尼亚/欧盟电气规范下无法实现，将无法通过TJA和Elektrilevi的现场验收。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。爱沙尼亚特定低温差距：中国安装设计标准不涉及-30°C室外布线、防冻外壳或低温天气RCD性能——爱沙尼亚项目文件须解决这些问题。
gap.zht: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722為安裝標準，規範建築側固定布線及保護裝置。出口充電設備應依據歐盟安裝實務聲明與B型RCD相容，或內置直流故障保護以允許使用A型RCD。若充電設備要求的安裝條件在愛沙尼亞/歐盟電氣規範下無法實現，將無法通過TJA和Elektrilevi的現場驗收。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。愛沙尼亞特定低溫差距：中國安裝設計標準不涉及-30°C室外布線、防凍外殼或低溫天氣RCD性能——愛沙尼亞項目文件須解決這些問題。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation sits in Estonian electrical installation law (enforced by TJA) and Elektrilevi grid codes. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 are the adopted technical standards. Product compatibility is a practical market requirement enforced at installation inspection.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 under MOHURD; Chinese installation standards do not address Estonian cold-climate requirements

source.publisher: Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation (EVS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 govern building-side installation practice as adopted through Estonian national rules and enforced by TJA and Elektrilevi. EV chargers exported to Estonia should be compatible with the RCD and earthing requirements, declare cold-climate wiring and enclosure ratings down to −30 °C, and not require installation conditions unavailable in Estonia. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722通过爱沙尼亚国家规则采纳后，由TJA和Elektrilevi负责规范建筑侧安装实践并执法。出口爱沙尼亚的充电设备应与RCD和接地要求兼容，声明低至-30°C的低温气候布线和外壳额定值，且不得要求爱沙尼亚无法实现的安装条件。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722通過愛沙尼亞國家規則採納後，由TJA和Elektrilevi負責規範建築側安裝實務並執法。出口愛沙尼亞的充電設備應與RCD和接地要求相容，聲明低至-30°C的低溫氣候布線和外殼額定值，且不得要求愛沙尼亞無法實現的安裝條件。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。
